  1. org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer

  1. Description

Package org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer

package org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer
  • Class
    Description
    Customer
    Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer handling.
    CustomerCharge
    Class that records charges made on customer membership credits.
    CustomerDebt
    Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer debt handling.
    CustomerEnums
    A collection of enums that represent a defined set of data relating to a customer.
    CustomerEnums.AccountStatus
    Three possible statuses for a customer's account that can dictate their ability to make payments.
    CustomerEnums.CardType
    The three main card vendors, but also includes "Other" to cover any other vendor.
    CustomerEnums.DiscountPlan
    The two possible discount plans a customer can choose from.
    CustomerEnums.PaymentMethod
    The three payment methods a customer can use to complete a transaction.
    CustomerEnums.ReminderStatus
    The three possible statuses for a customer's reminder.
    CustomerEnums.ReminderType
    Reminders get sent twice per month, this enum represents the two types of reminders.
    CustomerMonthlySpend
    Class that records monthly spend of customers and uses that data to also calculate whether a rate change is needed.
    CustomerMonthlySpend.FlexiRateChange
    This record stores the need for a rate change and the new rate and is returned by CustomerMonthlySpend.warrantsRateChange(int id) and used by SaleService to adjust flexi rates accordingly.
    CustomerPayment
    Class that records customer payments and absolves debt status to applicable customers.
    CustomerReminder
    Class that records reminders sent to customers.
